titleStmt.title: SII 26.473: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 473. (A.R. No. 450 of 1909.) MAṆAPPAḌAIVĪḌU, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records an order of the king (name not mentioned) addressed to a certain Periya Tiruvaḍi Nayiṉār of Māṟaṉmaṅgalam and the dēvakaṉmis and the tāṉattāṟ of the temple of the god Mūṉṟīśvaramuḍaiyanāyiṉār of Ambalattāḍinallūr, alias Maṇappaḍaivīḍu in the north-eastern quarter of Śrīvallavaṉ-maṅgalam, a Brahmadēśam, in Kīḻkaḷak-kūṟṟam. The order related to the grant of land in Maṇakkuḍi, Marudānambikuṟuchchi and Maṇappaḍaivīḍu to the temple of the above-mentioned god, by the king to provide for the procession, both in the morning and in the evening, everyday of śrīibali, for the bathing ceremony of the image of the god Maṇavaikkuvāytta Perumāḷ on every Chittirai star day (in a month) for the deitys festivals, and for worship and offerings on Puṇaragam (?) (Punarpūsam ?) days in the month of Māśi every year, the birth-day of the king. As ordered, the above-mentioned parties had agreed to conduct the worship, services and festivals in the temple heriditarily.
The signatory was a certain Peṟṟa Perumāḷ, the village accountant.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Aruḷicceyal kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattu brahmadeśam śrīvalla
vaṉ maṅkalattu vaṭakiḻ piṭākai Ampalattāṭinallūrā
ṉa maṇappaṭaivīṭṭil Uṭaiyār muṉṟiśvaramuṭaiya nayiṉā
rkku Iraṇṭu canti civali Eḻuntaruḷumpaṭiyum cittirai cittiraikku ma
ṇavaikkuvāyttaperumāḷai tirumañcaṉamum ceyvittut tiruvu
lāppuṟam Eḻuntaruḷumpaṭiyum mācimātattil puṇarakam Āṭṭai piṟa
nta nāḷukku kāṇiyum pūcaiyum naṭakkumpaṭiyum kaṟpitta vakaikku ma
ṇakkuṭi marutānampikuṟucci maṇappaṭaivīṭu Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟil Aṟu
nūṟṟu nāṟpattiraṇṭāmāṇṭu kārmutalukku pūvaḻi payirniṉṟa nilattu
kku māttāl koṭṭai mākāṇi Ākap patintu Atikāriperil kūṭṭi
t taṇṭi Iṉṉāyiṉārkkut tirunaṭṭap perumāḷ puḷḷiyil pattu mā nila
m puḷḷiyum Iṭṭu Inta puḷḷiyil melvārattukku Atikāriyai
yk koṇṭu kuṟiyum vāṅkik koṇṭup puḷḷiyilu Uḷḷa ne
llukkum tevatāṉa mutalukkum maṟṟum nelvakai paṇa
vakai Uṭppaṭṭa vakaikkum Ikkoyilukku Ācantirāti
tavaṟ cantatip piṟavecame kāṇi Āṭcai Āka cipaṇṭārak kaṇak
ku Eḻutumpaṭi kaṟpitta māṟaṉmaṅkalattu periya tiruvaṭi nayiṉār
Uṭaiyārum Ikkovilil tevakaṉmikaḷum kūṭi kuṟi Eḻuticel
vvippittukkoṇṭu Iraṇṭu canti cipaliyum tirumañcaṉamum tiruvi
ḻāppuṟamum Eḻuntaruḷuvittu pūcaiyum naṭakkumpaṭikku Eṅkaḷukkum tāṉa
ttārkkum tirumukam varukaiyil tirumukattiṉpaṭiye paṭittarattiṉ
paṭipūcaiyum naṭakkumpaṭi cantirātittavaṟ santatip piṟavecame naṭak
kumpaṭi kalveṭṭik kuṭuttom Ūravar paṇikka Ūrkaṇakku
peṟṟaperumāḷ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.473 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
